title: The Girl with the Golden Hands
original_title: Das Mädchen mit den goldenen Händen
overview: East Germany, in autumn 1999. Gudrun Pfaff is about to turn sixty when she finds out that the orphanage she grew up in is being sold to turn into a hotel, and she is willing to do anything to stop it.
